_comment: The ats_account per-tenant registry entity under plain per-record LWW. A1B2 (iOS) creates an account for the `acme.wd5` Workday tenant as `pending_verification` @12:00; C3D4 (desktop) later signs in to the same tenant and re-emits it `active` @12:05, so the completed sign-in wins and the account is remembered as active on every device. The `globex.wd1` account shows retirement: A1B2 registers it @12:00, then deletes it @12:20 (user removed the saved account), tombstoning it. The id is `{provider}:{tenant_host}`; a password never appears in any record.

workday:acme.wd5.myworkdayjobs.com._won_from: C3D4 active @ 12:05 beats A1B2 pending_verification @ 12:00 — a completed sign-in promotes the account to active

workday:globex.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com._won_from: A1B2 delete @ 12:20 beats its own active @ 12:00 — retired account pruned
